{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20847_1
|class_id=20847
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20847_2
|fame=14
|art=13
|fth=11
|civ=18
|tech=34
|ss1=prop@59016_2<br>prop@66640_2
|ss2=prop@59016_2<br>prop@66640_2
|ss3=prop@59016_2<br>prop@66640_2
|ss4=prop@59016_2<br>prop@66640_2
|ss7=prop@59016_2<br>prop@66640_2<br> (Awakened)
}}
